features: Allows sweat and moisture to evaporate
description: Product description Assortment of 100 fabric plasters in assorted sizes. Used to provide protection to cuts and scrapes 100 pieces per pack Ventilated strip allows sweat and moisture to evaporate Latex free Long lasting surestick adhesive 20 - 76mm x 19mm / 32 x 0.8" 20 - 55mm x 19mm / 2.22 x 0.8" 50 - 40mm x 10mm / 1.62 x 0.4" 10 - round 22mm / 0.9" Directions Clean the wound, apply the plaster, and ensure it sticks well due to the adhesive.
